name: tonder-web-sdk
description: Integrate the Tonder Web SDK into browser-based web apps.

interface.shortDescription: Integrate Tonder payments into web apps.
interface.longDescription: Guides Codex through safe Tonder Web SDK integration for browser-based web apps, including vanilla HTML, React, Next.js, Angular, card payments, saved cards, payment methods, and SafetyPay banks.
defaultPrompt: Add Tonder card payments to this checkout.
Add Tonder payment methods to this app.
